title: Dark End
description: Dark End - This is a resource pack that makes the end darker and more comfortable for the eyes!
body:
![DE1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ca204321b19759302cefdea30fba5005ef03e7_0.webp)



                                                           Adds A Dark End Style

![T1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b8db1276b82454dc9beb5f85ef88bed2d03d497_0.webp)



 Feature:
 
 - Adds A Dark End Style

 - Change End Blocks

 - Makes The Blocks From The End Darker

 - Increases Comfort

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

This is a great solution if your eyes get tired after spending a lot of time in the end.
